3033930.name: Zombie Dolls
3033930.description:
Zombie Dolls is a twin-stick shooter survival game with rogue-like elements. Defend your neighborhood against an invasion of cute zombiefied alien dolls using a large arsenal of guns, bombs, and melee weapons.

Choose from a powerful selection of upgrades and special skills to enhance and develop your character. The game can be played as a traditional twin-stick shooter or as an auto-shooter for a more relaxed play style.

INCLUDES REMAKE OF THE ORIGINAL FLASH GAME

The game started out as a Flash game which we released way back in 2011. We decided to bring the game back but this time in glorious HD. It plays the same as the original, but with many quality of life improvements, more stages, more dolls and lots of upgrades.

SUPPORT US

Zombie Dolls is still in development. If you have any questions or suggestions feel free to post on the forum or send us an email. You can also follow us on X @TinyBruteStudio.

If you want to support us you can do so by wishlisting the game and providing feedback, which we would really appreciate!
